_meta.description: Centralized creative style definitions per category. Used by Flow Director, copy_engine, and social posting.

apple_minimal.name: Apple Minimal

visual.background: pure white or matte black gradient
visual.lighting: soft studio, single key light, subtle rim light
visual.composition: center product, massive white space, asymmetric crop

apple_minimal.typography: thin sans-serif, massive spacing, lowercase preferred

futuristic_tech.name: Futuristic Tech

visual.background: dark gradient, deep blue/purple, subtle grid pattern
visual.lighting: neon accent, blue/cyan rim light, volumetric haze
visual.composition: low angle, dramatic perspective, product floating

futuristic_tech.typography: geometric sans-serif, neon accent color, tech feel

luxury_skincare.name: Luxury Skincare

visual.background: soft cream/blush gradient or marble surface
visual.lighting: soft diffused, golden hour warmth, dewy highlights
visual.composition: macro detail, texture focus, product at slight angle
visual.texture: dewy drops, cream swirls, silk fabric, marble
visual.depth_of_field: very shallow, extreme macro on texture

luxury_skincare.typography: elegant serif, cream/gold tones, generous spacing

nike_campaign.name: Nike Campaign

visual.background: urban concrete, motion blur cityscape, or pure white
visual.lighting: dramatic side light, high contrast, hard shadows
visual.composition: dynamic angle, off-center, motion implied, product in action
visual.depth_of_field: selective focus on product, environment blurred

nike_campaign.typography: bold condensed sans-serif, ALL CAPS, high contrast

editorial_luxury.name: Editorial Luxury

visual.background: dark leather surface, velvet, or studio gradient
visual.lighting: dramatic accent light, warm golden, selective illumination
visual.composition: product hero, editorial styling, detail focus
visual.texture: leather grain, metal reflection, fabric drape

editorial_luxury.typography: thin serif, gold on dark, elegant spacing

scandinavian_warm.name: Scandinavian Warm

visual.background: light wood surface, white marble, linen fabric
visual.lighting: warm natural window light, soft shadows, golden hour
visual.composition: lifestyle context, product in-situ, styled scene
visual.texture: wood grain, linen weave, ceramic matte, marble veining

scandinavian_warm.typography: rounded sans-serif, warm tones, friendly spacing

lifestyle_active.name: Lifestyle Active

visual.background: gym setting, outdoor trail, or clean colored backdrop matching product
visual.lighting: bright, energetic, slight overexposure for freshness
visual.composition: product as hero, slight tilt, vibrant color pop
visual.texture: water condensation, gym concrete, rubber matting
visual.depth_of_field: shallow, product sharp, vibrant background blur

lifestyle_active.typography: bold sans-serif, product color accent, energetic
